input.background: Scores derived from a patient satisfaction survey are Normally distributed with μ=50 and σ=7.5, with high scores indicating high satisfaction. An SRS of n=36 is taken from this population.
input.question: What is the SE of x̄ for these data?

population_mean.description: The mean (μ) of the population's satisfaction scores, indicating the average satisfaction level.

population_sd.description: The standard deviation (σ) of the population's satisfaction scores, indicating the variability in satisfaction levels.

sample_size.description: The size (n) of the simple random sample (SRS) taken from the population.
